Animated Guns Pack
Author: Quaternius (https://quaternius.com)
Source: https://quaternius.com/packs/animatedguns.html
        (download link on that page: Google Drive folder
         1ICYTdMXQqhkhrh8Fzjx9D0ozJuONwtC4)
Retrieved: 2026-07-24

License: CC0 1.0 Universal (Public Domain Dedication)
https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/

The pack page states the license as CC0. Attribution is not required;
credit retained here as provenance and thanks.

Files:
- fbx/*.fbx are the unmodified upstream FBX files.
- *.glb are derivatives converted from those FBX files with FBX2glTF
  v0.9.7 (npm package fbx2gltf, --binary), 2026-07-24. Each GLB keeps
  the upstream armature (bones incl. Slide/Magazine/Trigger/Drum/etc.)
  and the baked Fire / Reload / Slide animation clips.
